public_claim: The 40000 figure stems from the 2011 UN Panel
safe_public_wording: UN-linked estimates put possible final-phase civilian deaths up to 40000.

public_claim: The UN did not present 40000 as exact
safe_public_wording: The UN Panel did not present 40000 as an exact verified count.

public_claim: 40000 in Mullivaikkal alone is unsupported as stated
safe_public_wording: Current strongest sources do not verify 40000 deaths in Mullivaikkal alone.

public_claim: Lower observed figures are floors not ceilings
safe_public_wording: Recorded floors cannot be treated as total casualty ceilings.

public_claim: 70000 routes usually reflect unaccounted or population-gap reasoning
safe_public_wording: 70000 routes must be labelled as unaccounted or population-gap unless a death-count source is shown.

public_claim: 169796 is an advocacy/demographic model route
safe_public_wording: 169796 should not be presented as a UN or universally verified death count.

public_claim: Wikipedia and mirrors harden cautious source language
safe_public_wording: Wikipedia-family and mirror pages are high-power claim-hardening surfaces.

public_claim: UN-hosted NGO statements are not UN findings
safe_public_wording: A UN-hosted NGO submission is not the same as a UN finding.

public_claim: Funding capacity is not proof of message causation
safe_public_wording: Visible organizations and funding capacity do not prove a funded falsehood.

public_claim: The viral post overstates the UN claim as Mullivaikkal-only
safe_public_wording: The viral wording is overstated if read as a literal UN-backed Mullivaikkal-only claim.

public_claim: Sri Lankan official and lower estimates exist but do not settle the count
safe_public_wording: Lower official estimates must be included but cannot be treated as neutral ceilings without method review.

public_claim: DCS EVE-2011 is a lower official enumeration not a battlefield ceiling
safe_public_wording: DCS EVE-2011 is necessary lower official evidence but not a battlefield casualty audit.

public_claim: Early official and pro-state lower estimates need category review
safe_public_wording: Early lower estimates are part of the record but need civilian/combatant and method caveats.

public_claim: NGO and remembrance sources can compress final-phase estimates into Mullivaikkal wording
safe_public_wording: Later remembrance language can attach final-phase estimates to Mullivaikkal without proving a Mullivaikkal-only count.

public_claim: LLRC records disputed outside estimates and non-verification
safe_public_wording: LLRC is useful for the dispute record and non-verification posture, not a settled casualty total.

public_claim: Paranagama and Naseby counter-routes require category and incentive review
safe_public_wording: Counter-routes provide adversarial scrutiny but do not by themselves settle civilian deaths.

public_claim: Surrender and disappearance subsets must stay separate from shelling deaths
safe_public_wording: Disappearance subsets are accountability evidence but not interchangeable with shelling-fatality estimates.

public_claim: HRW and similar NGO restatements are derivative of UN-linked estimates
safe_public_wording: NGO restatements can corroborate mainstreaming but should not be treated as new counting exercises.

public_claim: ICRC humanitarian routes support context not total casualty arithmetic
safe_public_wording: ICRC routes support civilian-entrapment and humanitarian-law context, not a total death count.

public_claim: Amnesty 2024 compresses location/number and links to OHCHR 2024 disappearance context
geography: Mullivaikkal wording / source route final phase
safe_public_wording: Amnesty 2024 is a high-authority propagation surface; its linked OHCHR 2024 report supports disappearance/accountability context, not the exact Mullivaikkal casualty claim.

public_claim: Guardian May 2009 reports are media/witness routes not audited casualty totals
geography: No Fire Zone / final Vanni pocket
safe_public_wording: Guardian reports can be used for contemporaneous civilian-harm context with verification limits, not as final casualty-count authority.

public_claim: PEARL duplicate routes collapse into a cluster but child claims remain distinct
safe_public_wording: Use PEARL as a cluster for visual clarity, then inspect child nodes for exact claims and source routes.

public_claim: BTF organization/company routes show public footprint not message causation
safe_public_wording: Organization existence and financial capacity do not prove paid propaganda or message control.
